title: AppManifest
description: Declares an app's data shape and available actions. Deliberately contains NO layout information — that is the renderer's job, not the app author's. If you find yourself adding a 'layout_hint' field here, stop: that's the discipline this schema exists to enforce.

entities.description: Named data shapes this app works with. Each entity is a flat record type.

primary.description: True for the 1-2 fields that best identify a record (used as title/subtitle in list/glance templates).

sensitive.description: Flags fields that should be scoped/redacted more conservatively (e.g. health, financial).

actions.description: Every action a user (or the AI on their behalf) can invoke. This is the ONLY way the app's state can change.

entity.description: Which entity this action operates on.

required_scope.description: Capability scope string required to invoke this action, e.g. 'tasklist:write' or 'contacts:read'.

destructive.description: If true, MUST pass through the deterministic confirmation gate regardless of caller.

params.description: Optional param schema for custom actions, keyed by param name -> field type.
